## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (unit + content validation)
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes
- [ ] Any new/changed shortcut is verified against real tmux 3.x and lives in `js/keybindings.js`
- [ ] No new runtime dependency, build step, or persistence added to the shipped game
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated if behavior changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out (tradeoffs, follow-ups, screenshots).
